title: Sh@buw'el #7619
definition:
Shebuel or Shubael = "captive of God"

 1) son of Gershom and grandson of Moses
 2) one of the 14 sons of Heman the musician
nasbUsage:
Definition: Shebuel or Shubael = "captive of God"

 1) son of Gershom and grandson of Moses
 2) one of the 14 sons of Heman the musician

    NASB:  captive (or returned) of God, two Isr.
